opinion.p: 561 U. S. ____ (2010) 561 U. S. ____ (2010) 561 U. S. ____ (2010) SUPREME COURT OF THE UNITED STATES NO. 08-1196 BRUCE WEYHRAUCH, PETITIONER v. UNITED STATES
on writ of certiorari to the united states court of appeals for the ninth circuit
The judgment is vacated, and the case is remanded to the United States Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit for further consideration in light of Skilling v. United States, ante, p. ___.
